sizing_rule.note: Position size = Fixed Dollar Risk (1000) / (20-day ATR × 1.5). Volatility-scaled approach normalizes risk across instruments with different price fluctuations. Higher ATR → smaller position; lower ATR → larger position.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size according to the volatility of each portfolio element, measured by average true range, to normalize risk exposure across instruments with different price fluctuations.
